subcodes.first_line: Hath the earth been adorned with those whom tribulation deterreth not from gazing upon God, the Most High, the Most Exalted, and doth there walk thereon one who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل زینت الارض بالذین لایمنعهم البلاء عن النظر الی الله العلی الاعلی و هل یمشی علیها من
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
